ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: Not(Contains($Profile.Name, "Ops")) && Not(Contains($Profile.Name, "Admin"))&& ( ISCHANGED(Title) || ISCHANGED(Division) || ISCHANGED(Department) || ISCHANGED(CompanyName) || ISCHANGED(Admin_Console__c) || ISCHANGED(Financial_Invoice_Management__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to edit user detail. Please contact SalesOps for further assistance
